name: Grilled Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill to medium heat.
2. Brush the eggplant slices with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
3. Place the eggplant on the grill and cook until tender and lightly charred, about 4-5 minutes per side.
4. In a large bowl, combine cooked brown rice, diced tomatoes (if using), sliced red onion, and lettuce leaves.
5. To assemble skewer-style grilled eggplant, thread the cooked eggplant slices onto metal or wooden skewers.
6. Place the skewered eggplant on the grill and cook until lightly charred, about 3-4 minutes per side.
7. Serve the grilled eggplant slices over the bed of brown rice with additional lettuce leaves on top.
8. Turn off the heat when serving.
